sql.value_old: select @i := CONCAT('Resumen_OT_',O.NUMEROORDEN,'_',DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(), '%Y%m%d'),'.pdf') AS MAP_NOMBRE_FICHERO,O.ID,IFNULL(O.PDF_CREADO,0) AS PDF_CREADO,'##GP_MONITORPATH##TemplateAp.xml' AS TEMPLATE, concat('##GP_REPLICAFILES##',@i) AS FILEDDEST from gen_ot_cabecera O INNER JOIN (select MAX(ID) AS ID,TASK_ID from gen_ot_estados GROUP BY TASK_ID) E ON E.TASK_ID = O.TASK_ID INNER JOIN gen_ot_estados ER ON ER.ID = E.ID WHERE ER.ESTADO IN (5) AND AREA_EMPRESA LIKE 'L%' AND IFNULL(O.PDF_CREADO,0) = 0
sql.value: select @i := CONCAT('Resumen_OT_',O.NUMEROORDEN,'_',DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(), '%Y%m%d'),'.pdf') AS MAP_NOMBRE_FICHERO,O.ID,O.NUMEROORDEN,O.PUESTO_TRABAJO AS COD_BRIGADA,uuid() AS NEW_ROWID,IFNULL(O.PDF_CREADO,0) AS PDF_CREADO,concat('##GP_MONITORPATH##',m.PDF_PLANTILLA) AS TEMPLATE,concat('##GP_REPLICAFILES##',@i) AS FILEDDEST from gen_ot_cabecera O INNER JOIN (select MAX(ID) AS ID,TASK_ID from gen_ot_estados GROUP BY TASK_ID) E ON E.TASK_ID = O.TASK_ID INNER JOIN gen_ot_estados ER ON ER.ID = E.ID left join monitor_ot_pdf_generate m on IFNULL(O.AREA_EMPRESA,'') like concat(m.AREA_EMPRESA,'%') and ifnull(m.CLASE_ACTIVIDAD,O.CLASE_ACTIVIDAD) like concat('%',O.CLASE_ACTIVIDAD,'%') and ifnull(m.CLASE_ORDEN,O.CLASE_ORDEN) = O.CLASE_ORDEN and ifnull(m.NO_CLASE_ACTIVIDAD,'') not like concat('%',O.CLASE_ACTIVIDAD,'%') and ifnull(m.NO_CLASE_ORDEN,'') not like concat('%',O.CLASE_ORDEN,'%') WHERE ER.ESTADO IN (5)  and m.ID is not null and m.PDF_PLANTILLA is not null AND IFNULL(O.PDF_CREADO,0) = 0 and m.PDF_PLANTILLA='TemplateCt.xml'

after-action.name: executequery
after-action.value: INSERT INTO gen_ot_fotos (NUMEROORDEN,NOMBRE_FICHERO,DESCRIPCION,BAJA,PROCESADO,ORIGEN,ROWID,COD_BRIGADA,FILE_SIZE) SELECT '##ROW_NUMEROORDEN##','##ROW_MAP_NOMBRE_FICHERO##','Resumen de la Ot',0,0,'M','##ROW_NEW_ROWID##','##ROW_COD_BRIGADA##',##PDF_SIZE_KB## FROM dual WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gen_ot_fotos WHERE NUMEROORDEN='##ROW_NUMEROORDEN##' AND NOMBRE_FICHERO='##ROW_MAP_NOMBRE_FICHERO##')

after-action.name: executequery
after-action.value: INSERT INTO master_replica_queue (ROWID,MID,DMID,CGSSQL,OPER,TBL,OPERID,TIMESTAMP) VALUES ('##ROW_NEW_ROWID##',9999,0,'INSERT INTO gen_ot_fotos (NUMEROORDEN,NOMBRE_FICHERO,DESCRIPCION,BAJA,PROCESADO,ORIGEN,ROWID,COD_BRIGADA,FILE_SIZE) VALUES (''##ROW_NUMEROORDEN##'',''##ROW_MAP_NOMBRE_FICHERO##'',''Resumen de la Ot'',0,0,''M'',''##ROW_NEW_ROWID##'',''##ROW_COD_BRIGADA##'',##PDF_SIZE_KB##)',1,'gen_ot_fotos',uuid(),SYSDATE())

sql.value: select @i := CONCAT('Resumen_OT_',O.NUMEROORDEN,'_',DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(), '%Y%m%d'),'.pdf') AS MAP_NOMBRE_FICHERO,O.ID,IFNULL(O.PDF_CREADO,0) AS PDF_CREADO,'##GP_MONITORPATH##TemplateCt.xml' AS TEMPLATE, concat('##GP_REPLICAFILES##',@i) AS FILEDDEST from gen_ot_cabecera O INNER JOIN (select MAX(ID) AS ID,TASK_ID from gen_ot_estados GROUP BY TASK_ID) E ON E.TASK_ID = O.TASK_ID INNER JOIN gen_ot_estados ER ON ER.ID = E.ID left outer join gen_ct ct on ct.g3e_fid = O.codigo_ubicacion left outer join gen_ctc ctc on ctc.g3e_fid = O.codigo_ubicacion WHERE ER.ESTADO IN (5) AND AREA_EMPRESA LIKE 'C%' and (ct.ID is not null or ctc.ID is not NULL) AND IFNULL(O.PDF_CREADO,0) = 0

actions.name: executequery
actions.value: INSERT INTO adm_monitor_process (CHECKING,LOGMESSAGE,STARTTIME,SERVER) SELECT '##CHKNAME##' AS CHECKING, 'Ok' AS LOGMESSAGE,SYSDATE() AS STARTTIME,'##APPNAME##' AS SERVER from dual ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE  CHECKING=VALUES(CHECKING), LOGMESSAGE=VALUES(LOGMESSAGE), STARTTIME=VALUES(STARTTIME), SERVER=VALUES(SERVER)

sql.value: select @i := CONCAT('carta_OT_',o2.NUMEROORDEN,'_',DATE_FORMAT(SYSDATE(), '%Y%m%d'),'.pdf') AS MAP_NOMBRE_FICHERO, o2.ID,'##GP_MONITORPATH##TemplateCarta.xml' AS TEMPLATE, concat('##GP_REPLICAFILES##',@i) AS FILEDDEST from (SELECT o1.NUMEROORDEN,MAX(o1.ID) AS ID from gen_ot_cabecera o1 inner join gen_ot_estados es on es.NUMEROORDEN=o1.NUMEROORDEN and es.task_id = o1.task_id and es.ESTADO=4 where CLASE_ORDEN IN ('DPRP','DPRN') AND CLASE_ACTIVIDAD ='DR7' AND UBICACION_TECNICA LIKE 'C%' AND AREA_EMPRESA = 'CCM' GROUP BY NUMEROORDEN) o INNER JOIN gen_ot_cabecera o2 on o2.ID=o.ID AND o2.CREACION_PDF_CARTA IN (0,-2)

SELECT O.ID,O.NUMEROORDEN,O.NOMBRE_FICHERO_PDF AS NOMBRE_FICHERO,O.PUESTO_TRABAJO AS COD_BRIGADA,uuid() as NEW_ROWID FROM gen_ot_cabecera O WHERE O.PDF_CREADO=1 AND O.NOMBRE_FICHERO_PDF IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gen_ot_fotos WHERE NUMEROORDEN=O.NUMEROORDEN AND NOMBRE_FICHERO=O.NOMBRE_FICHERO_PDF)

actions.name: executequery
actions.value: INSERT INTO gen_ot_fotos (NUMEROORDEN,NOMBRE_FICHERO,DESCRIPCION,BAJA,PROCESADO,ORIGEN,ROWID,COD_BRIGADA) VALUES ('##ROW_NUMEROORDEN##','##ROW_NOMBRE_FICHERO##','Resumen de la Ot',0,0,'M','##ROW_NEW_ROWID##','##ROW_COD_BRIGADA##')
